product_updates.title: What the jury will actually decide in the case of Elon Musk vs. Sam Altman
product_updates.content: Here's what the biggest tech court case of the year is all about.

product_updates.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceXAI has been bleeding staff since its merger
product_updates.content: More than 50 employees have reportedly left Elon Musk’s newly merged SpaceXAI since February, raising questions about burnout, leadership changes, talent poaching, and whether liquidity events weakened retention incentives.

product_updates.title: OpenAI says Codex is coming to your phone
product_updates.content: The update gives users enhanced flexibility over how they can manage their workflows.

product_updates.title: What happens when AI starts building itself?
product_updates.content: Richard Socher's new $650 million startup wants to build an AI that can research and improve itself indefinitely — and he insists it will actually ship products.

product_updates.title: OpenAI is reportedly preparing legal action against Apple; it wouldn’t be the first partner to feel burned
product_updates.content: OpenAI is so frustrated with Apple over a ChatGPT integration that failed to deliver the subscribers and prominence it expected that the company is now actively exploring legal action against the iPhone maker.

product_updates.title: Clawdmeter turns your Claude Code usage stats into a tiny desktop dashboard
product_updates.content: A new open source gadget called Clawdmeter turns Claude Code usage stats into a tiny desktop dashboard for AI coding power users.

product_updates.title: Cerebras raises $5.5B, then stock pops $108%, in the first huge tech IPO of 2026
product_updates.content: A year ago, it looked like this day would never happen for Cerebras.

product_updates.title: Khosla Ventures is betting $10M on Ian Crosby, whose first startup, Bench, imploded
product_updates.content: Crosby is building Synthetic, a fully autonomous AI bookkeeping service for other startups.

product_updates.title: Cisco cuts nearly 4,000 jobs to spend more on AI, reports ‘record quarterly revenue’
product_updates.content: This is Cisco's latest layoff in recent years, while the company's chief executive touts record revenue and growth.

product_updates.title: Two weeks left: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close May 27
product_updates.content: Your shot at VC access, global visibility, TechCrunch coverage, and $100K equity-free funding is running out. Deadline to apply is May 27. Apply now.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Zero-day exploit completely defeats default Windows 11 BitLocker protections
technical_breakthroughs.content: It's not entirely clear how the exploit works. Microsoft says it's investigating.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Cisco announces record revenue and 4,000 layoffs in the same day
technical_breakthroughs.content: Layoffs are "not a savings-driven restructure," CFO says.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Data readiness for agentic AI in financial services
technical_breakthroughs.content: Financial services companies have unique needs when it comes to business AI. They operate in one of the most highly regulated sectors while responding to external events that are updated by the second. As a result, the success of agentic AI in financial services depends less on the sophistication…

technical_breakthroughs.title: Establishing AI and data sovereignty in the age of autonomous systems
technical_breakthroughs.content: When generative AI first moved from research labs into real-world business applications, enterprises made a tacit bargain: “Capability now, control later.” Feed your proprietary data into third-party AI models, and you will get powerful results. But your data passes through systems you do not own…

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: deepfake porn’s stolen bodies and AI sharing private numbers
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. technical_breakthroughs.title: The Tesla Semi could be a big deal for electric trucking
technical_breakthroughs.content: The Tesla Semi has officially arrived. The company recently released a photo of the first vehicle rolling off its new full-scale production line. This moment has been nearly a decade in the making: The company first announced the truck in late 2017. And now we’ve got final battery specs, official…

technical_breakthroughs.title: The shock of seeing your body used in deepfake porn
technical_breakthroughs.content: When Jennifer got a job doing research for a nonprofit in 2023, she ran her new professional headshot through a facial recognition program. She wanted to see if the tech would pull up the porn videos she’d made more than 10 years before, when she was in her early 20s. It did in fact return…
